title: Riku Nakamura’s CV
text:
Computer Science

|GitHub 
LinkedIn



Pursuing a Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science at BYU-Idaho. Dedicated to creating an environment where everyone can make proactive choices through technology and community building. Currently seeking career opportunities in Japan for the 2027 graduate recruitment cycle.


Java (Spring Framework), JavaScript (React Native), HTML/CSS, Marketing & Sales Strategy



Cooling, power series, optics, alchemy, planetary motions, apples.Web Development, Data Analysis, Consumer Psychology, Self-Analysis, Community Management




Jan 2026 - Present Brigham Young University - Idaho
B.S. in Computer Science (Expected Graduation: Spring 2027)
Apr 2024 - Dec 2025 Ensign College
Pre-transfer studies
Apr 2019 - Mar 2024 Ube National College of Technology
Associate of Engineering in Material Engineering



`Dec 2025 Job Offer
Zensho Holdings Co., Ltd.
Jan 2026 - Present Job Hunting Status
Currently participating in the 2027 new graduate recruitment process for LINE Yahoo (LY Corporation) and other major IT firms via ONE CAREER and ABABA.



Aug 2025 Nakamura R, Productivity Management Application for Accounting Firms.
Developed a custom efficiency tool to streamline internal workflows and task management.
Oct 2025 Nakamura R, Matching Application for Recruitment Agencies.
Built a platform to facilitate efficient talent-company matching processes.


Feb 2026 Freelance Service Agreement, TOKUMORI Patent/Contract 001.
Signed as a freelance developer/consultant.




Jul 2026 - Aug 2026 (Planned) Internship, Japan
Mar 2024 Ube National College of Technology
Completed Associate Degree program
